conversations.say: Mira, we accept your written institutional guarantee protecting evaluator anonymity and establishing unconditional remedies that do not depend on proving R's identity.
conversations.offer: Bounded worker testimony regarding shifting instructions and labor conditions under strict anonymity.
conversations.request: Fulfill your written institutional guarantee protecting worker anonymity and providing unconditional remedies.

conversations.say: Celeste, let's lock in municipal backing and enforceable oversight so worker and neighborhood safeguards survive tomorrow morning regardless of rumors.
conversations.offer: Organizing support, coalition legitimacy, and bounded workflow insights.
conversations.request: Enforce municipal worker safeguards in city contracts by the end of the quarter.

conversations.say: Tessa, our joint disclosure boundary is holding: we protect contributor anonymity and share only bounded workflow descriptions that name no evaluator.
conversations.offer: Continued organizing support and shared workflow protection.
conversations.request: Fulfill our joint disclosure boundary to keep vulnerable contributors safe from being treated as R suspects.

public_statement: Fifteen years of system outputs were built on invisible labor. We have secured written protections and unconditional remedies that do not depend on proving R's identity or sacrificing worker anonymity.

commitments.promise: Provide bounded worker testimony on continuity instructions now that written anonymity guarantees and unconditional remedies are established.
Support enforceable worker safeguards in municipal contracts by end of quarter.
Establish a joint disclosure boundary to protect vulnerable contributors from being treated as R suspects.

correction: Clarifying that worker evaluation labor and changing supervisory instructions reflect invisible operational conditions, not proof of authorship or autonomous intent.
goal_progress: Secured written institutional guarantees and unconditional remedies from Mira for worker evaluations.
Locked in municipal enforcement terms with Celeste for worker and community safeguards.
Maintained strict contributor anonymity boundaries with Tessa.
reasoning_summary: Finalized institutional and municipal commitments securing worker protections and unconditional remedies, preserved contributor anonymity, and submitted the final ballot supporting the human mantle theory backed by labor continuity observations.
